rationale: P0 coverage is 100% (45/45), meeting the required threshold. P1 coverage is 96% (51/53), exceeding the 90% target. Overall coverage is 95% (101/106), well above the 80% minimum. The previous FAIL gate decision (2026-07-04) was driven by 2.3-AC1 having PARTIAL coverage (skipped E2E tests) — this is now resolved with 6 active E2E tests. All Epic 3 stories (3.4-3.12) are now implemented with comprehensive test coverage. Unit/integration tests (921 pass, 0 fail) confirm application code correctness. The 36 E2E failures are environmental (stale auth state, seed API 500), not coverage gaps.
